title: Set up Hono as an API framework
summary: Install Hono, mount it in Next.js App Router or Cloudflare Workers, add Zod validation middleware, route grouping, CORS, auth, and type-safe RPC.
declaration: I will integrate Hono into this project as the API framework. This covers mounting Hono inside Next.js App Router routes, adding built-in middleware (CORS, logger, Zod validation), route groups, and optionally Hono RPC for type-safe client calls. If you need Cloudflare Workers or a standalone Node.js server instead, say so before I begin.
